name: Ailey Extension
description: Vogue / heels / afro / house · 405 W 55th, Midtown · ~$18–22/class
note: Weekly evening classes on Mindbody. Vogue with Luz Guzman, Heels, Afro'Dance with Angel Kaba, West African with live drums. Book at ailey.org/classes.

name: Summer Sings
description: Drop-in choral singing · (most) Mondays 7:30pm · Judson Memorial Church, 243 Thompson St · $20/night ($15 student) or $120 season ($80 student)
note: Runs Jul 6 – Aug 31. Jul 13 CANCELLED for venue scheduling. No audition; conductor walks you through the piece.
